headline: AbbVie priced an $8.0 billion multi-tranche senior notes offering to refinance near-term debt and fund general corporate purposes.
investor_impact: This $8.0 billion debt issuance allows AbbVie to proactively manage its maturity profile by refinancing its 364-day term loan due May 2026. The transaction secures long-term financing across multiple tranches up to 2066, mitigating near-term refinancing risk and terming out its capital structure without diluting equity.
key_figures: $750 million senior floating rate notes due 2028
$4.0 billion 364-Day delayed draw term loan facility maturing May 2026 ($2.0 billion currently outstanding) targeted for repayment
